seo.title: Lokalit | Localization Platform for Modern Teams
seo.description: Ship multilingual products faster with Lokalit. Manage translation keys, collaborate across teams, and connect projects to Figma in one place.

hero.title: Localize faster, with fewer bottlenecks.
hero.description: Lokalit helps your team manage translation keys, coordinate language coverage, and keep content aligned between product, design and development.

steps.title: Create or join a project
steps.description: Authenticate once with NanoVibe SSO and access your organization projects securely.

steps.title: Manage translation keys
steps.description: Organize keys by project, define default and supported languages, and update values centrally.

steps.title: Collaborate with confidence
steps.description: Connect design and development workflows so teams can ship consistent multilingual experiences.

items.question: Who is Lokalit for?
items.answer: Lokalit is designed for product teams, developers, and localization contributors working on multilingual products.

items.question: Do I need a separate account?
items.answer: No. Lokalit is part of NanoVibe community project and uses NanoVibe SSO, so you can sign in with your existing NanoVibe account without creating a new one.

items.question: Can I connect design and localization workflows?
items.answer: Yes. Lokalit includes Figma-related integration flows so translation context stays close to the product design process.

items.question: What happens after I sign in?
items.answer: After authentication, you can access your dashboard, create projects, and manage localization projects and keys.
